description: Primary sources used for the Issue #1955 case study (Codex CLI event protocol, OTEL telemetry, and transient network-error classification). Codex facts verified against the openai/codex tag rust-v0.141.0 (the version in the failure log: app.version=0.141.0).

codex_event_protocol.title: codex-rs/exec/src/exec_events.rs (ThreadEvent enum — the 8 stdout event types)
codex-rs/exec/src/event_processor_with_jsonl_output.rs (standalone error keeps stream Running; turn.failed gates exit code)
codex-rs/exec/src/lib.rs (stderr fmt layer default RUST_LOG=error; exit(1) only on Failed/Interrupted)

codex_otel_telemetry.title: openai/codex#17909 (request: redaction toggle for arguments/output in codex.tool_result)

downstream_parser_contamination.title: openai/codex#21658 (maintainer: only protocol-shaped lines belong on a JSON stdout stream)
openai/codex#22393 (localized child-process status text breaks the JSON parser)
openai/codex#19816 (--output-schema applied to intermediate agent_message items fools parsers)
openai/codex#10248 (codex exec --json panics with Broken pipe when consumer closes stdout early)

network_error_classification.title: getaddrinfo(3) man-page (EAI_AGAIN = temporary, try again later; EAI_NONAME = not known)
Node.js common system errors (ECONNRESET, EPIPE, ETIMEDOUT, ...)
AWS SDK retry behavior (transient/retryable set: I/O failure, DNS resolution failure, socket timeout, 500/502/503/504)

related_hive_mind_prior_art.title: Issue #1881 — socket connection closed unexpectedly (classifyRetryableError socket branch)
Issue #1949 — Overloaded/529 is transient, not capacity (isCapacity=false)
